narrative:
Richmond Twp township has 550 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
